sources.title: The Trial ( Colorized, 1962) 720p
sources.description: The Trial (1962) colorized with HAVC. The film was colorized with a style that tries to maintain the visual impact of black and white version.

metadata.Plot: Josef K wakes up in the morning and finds the police in his room. They tell him that he is on trial but nobody tells him what he is accused of. In order to find out about the reason of this accusation and to protest his innocence, he tries to look behind the facade of the judicial system. But since this remains fruitless, there seems to be no chance for him to escape from this Kafkaesque nightmare.
metadata.Writer: Pierre Cholot, Franz Kafka, Orson Welles
metadata.Actors: Anthony Perkins, Arnoldo Foà, Jess Hahn
